name: Oriental Honey-Glazed Chicken
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon Chili paste, or more or less to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, whisk together all the marinade ingredients except the chicken.
2. Place the chicken in a large plastic food bag and pour in the marinade. Seal the bag tightly.
3. Turn the bag several times to ensure the chicken is well coated with the marinade.
4. Refrigerate for at least 4 hours or overnight.
5. Preheat your charcoal grill or broiler.
6. Remove the chicken from the marinade and pat dry thoroughly.
7. Grill or broil the chicken, about 6 inches from the heat source, brushing several times with remaining marinade until cooked through, approximately 20 to 30 minutes.
8. Serve hot or at room temperature.
